label: Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition

node.label: Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition
node.definition: Checkpoint composition assembles a runtime model from base weights, adapters, experts, heads, tokenizers, and configuration components under explicit compatibility rules.
node.why_it_matters: It makes specialized model construction modular, auditable, and reproducible across deployments.
limitations: Version skew, preprocessing differences, licenses, and memory duplication can break nominal compatibility.

dependencies.rationale: Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition turns Model merging & weight-space composition into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition turns Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition turns Object storage, sharding & checkpoints into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition turns Task vectors & parameter arithmetic into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
